title: For Recruiters | Your Name
description: A recruiter-facing summary page for the starter template.
heroTitle: A fast professional snapshot for hiring conversations
heroText: Use this page to summarise role fit, context, and working style without making a recruiter search across the whole site.

cards.title: Cross-functional profile
cards.text: Use this card to explain the mix of responsibilities, functions, or environments you work across.

cards.title: Best-fit role families
cards.text: List the role types that match you best so the page helps people place you quickly.

cards.title: Technical or analytical base
cards.text: Summarise the systems, methods, or technical foundations that support your broader work.

cards.title: Communication and delivery strengths
cards.text: Highlight the people-facing and execution-focused traits that matter in real hiring conversations.
